Hero.title: Curate your Mexican Escape
Hero.subtitle: Artisan travel planning for those who value time and exclusivity over ordinary sightseeing.

itineraries.title: Tailored Journeys
itineraries.desc: Day-by-day planning that aligns with your passions, from hidden beaches to culinary landmarks.

bookings.title: Premier Reservations
bookings.desc: Access the most sought-after tables and venues, from local gems to world-class dining.

transport.title: Seamless Mobility
transport.desc: Premium airport transfers and private transport options for effortless travel between points.

vip.title: Priority Access
vip.desc: Skip the lines with VIP excursions and adventures designed with exclusivity in mind.

concierge.title: On-Demand Support
concierge.desc: Instant communication with your personal concierge for real-time tips and adjustments.

local.title: Authentic Discovery
local.desc: Explore Mexico through the eyes of a local, with experiences shaped by your unique preferences.

why_us.title: The Odyssey Advantage
why_us.subtitle: We handle the complexity so you can focus on the memories.

immediate.title: Dynamic Response
immediate.desc: Agile itinerary design that evolves with your travel needs and local interests.

experts.title: Native Insights
experts.desc: Unlock Mexico’s best-kept secrets. Go beyond the guidebooks with our local expertise.

planning.title: Precision Logistics
planning.desc: Transparent, stress-free scheduling designed to maximize every second of your stay.

care.title: Individual Focus
care.desc: Your safety and comfort are paramount. We tailor every detail to your lifestyle and needs.

ArmaAventuraSection.title: Bespoke Assistance: Your Personal Host in Mexico
ArmaAventuraSection.description: Ditch the generic planning. Our concierge service refines every aspect of your journey—timing, budget, and taste—to create a trip that is uniquely yours. Simply share your vision; we'll bring it to life.

itineraries.label: Bespoke Itineraries:
itineraries.text: Comprehensive daily planning covering culture, wellness, food, and adventure.

restaurants.label: Gourmet Access:
restaurants.text: We curate and secure the best dining spots so you never have to wait.

transport.label: Private Transit:
transport.text: Coordinated transfers and car services for a fluid travel experience.

tours.label: Elite Tours:
tours.text: Handpicked activities with VIP perks and priority entry.

CotizacionSection.title: Ready to finalize your quote?
CotizacionSection.description: If you've received a custom proposal from your concierge, proceed here to review your budget and complete your booking securely.

payQuote.description: This portal is reserved for clients with pre-arranged itineraries and budgets provided by our concierge team.
payQuote.step1: 1. Valuation: Enter the agreed total (including VAT) in the price field.
payQuote.step2: 2. Reference: Provide your Folio Number or Package Name for tracking.
payQuote.step3: 3. Checkout: Click “Add to Bag” to enter our secure payment gateway.
payQuote.assistanceText: Need help with this specific reservation? Our team is standing by.
payQuote.checkoutSubtitle: Review and pay for your tailored quote
payQuote.confirmationDisclaimer: By proceeding, you verify that the amount and folio match the quote sent by Odyssey México.
